input-field.name: maxCreditPerOrder
input-field.label: Maximum credit per order
input-field.helpText: Maximum store credit amount that can be applied per order (0 = no limit)

component.name: sw-entity-multi-id-select
restrictedProducts
component.label: Restricted products
component.helpText: Select the products for which you want to be restricted from using store credits

input-field.name: runInstallOrderStateCommand
input-field.label: Run Order State Installer
input-field.helpText: Toggle and save to execute the order state installation command.

input-field.name: expandStoreCreditByDefault
input-field.label: Expand store credit section by default
input-field.helpText: If enabled, the store credit panel on checkout confirm will be expanded by default instead of collapsed.
